zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Sutton於1530年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Henry Sutton of Wellingore22歲，母親Margaret Hussey18歲。她於1569年與Bartholomew Arrmyne在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾奧斯格德比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1574年在她的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Sutton于1530年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Henry Sutton of Wellingore22岁，母亲Margaret Hussey18岁。她于1569年与Bartholomew Arrmyne在英国英格兰林可爾史爾奧斯格德比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1574年在她的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Sutton was born in 1530, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Henry Sutton of Wellingore, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Hussey, was 18. She married Bartholomew Arrmyne in 1569, in Osgodby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1574, in her hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Sutton est née en 1530, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Sutton of Wellingore, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hussey, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Bartholomew Arrmyne en 1569, à Osgodby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1574, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Sutton 1530 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sutton of Wellingore 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hussey 18. Sie hat 1569 in Osgodby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Bartholomew Arrmyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1574 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sutton è nata il nel 1530 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Henry Sutton of Wellingore, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hussey, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Bartholomew Arrmyne nel 1569, nel Osgodby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1574, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Suttonが1530年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Sutton of Wellingoreは22歳，母Margaret Husseyは18歳であった。1569年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアオスゴドビーでBartholomew Arrmyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1574年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Sutton(이)가 1530년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sutton of Wellingore(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hussey(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 오스고드비에서 Bartholomew Arrmyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Sutton nasceu em 1530, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Sutton of Wellingore, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hussey, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Bartholomew Arrmyne em 1569, em Osgodby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1574, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Sutton родилась в 1530 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Sutton of Wellingore было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hussey, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bartholomew Arrmyne в 1569 г. в местности осгодби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1574 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Sutton nació en 1530, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Sutton of Wellingore, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Hussey, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Bartholomew Arrmyne en 1569, en Osgodby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1574, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
